meaning: n.(塑料等的)加热成形,热力塑型 vt.使加热成形,给...用热力塑型
examples: Another intriguing example of packaging made smart by its functional attributes is the two-compartment thermoform that holds cafe Switch.
For optimum resistance to damage or theft, fully transparent custom thermoform clamshell (sometimes spelled "clam shell") packaging or blister packaging are ideal.
